case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. JORGE ARTURO GUERRERO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, JORGE ARTURO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO, JORGE ARTURO $13,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,422.75 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,022.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
